use_cases: Display subscription pricing plans with multiple tiers
Showcase SaaS product pricing with feature comparison
Present pricing options with call-to-action buttons
Compare pricing plans side-by-side on landing pages
Highlight recommended or popular pricing tiers
ai_summary: A pricing cards component designed for SaaS and subscription-based products. Features modern card layouts with tiered pricing options, typically including plan names, prices, features lists, and CTA buttons. Styled with clean gradients and subtle hover effects for enhanced interactivity on pricing pages.
